user.title: Add a custom universal media player
user.description: **Children are the real media players this player controls and reflects by default (state and attributes are read from the active one, commands are sent to it).**

data_description.name: The name to assign to the player.
data_description.children: Can be left empty. Ordered list of child media players that this entity will control.

device_class.title: Edit device class
device_class.description:
**The device class only affects how this player is displayed in the UI (icon, grouping) - it doesn't change its behavior.**

Suggested based on children: **{suggested_device_class}**

data_description.device_class: The device class that this entity represents.

config_commands.title: Configure commands - Guided
config_commands.description:
**By default, every command is sent to the active child. Use commands to send a specific command to a different entity or action instead.**

Pick an entity and an action for each command. Leave both blank to use the active child.

Saving here replaces all commands.

config_attributes_custom.title: Configure attributes - Custom (YAML)
config_attributes_custom.description:
**By default, the state and attributes come from the active child. Use attributes to pull a specific attribute from a different entity instead.**

Enter attribute overrides as YAML. Format: attribute_name: "entity_id|attribute"{problems}

data_description.attributes: Attributes that can be overridden. Most, if not all, media player attributes can be overridden.

config_commands_custom.title: Configure commands - Custom (YAML)
config_commands_custom.description:
**By default, every command is sent to the active child. Use commands to send a specific command to a different entity or action instead.**

This is the YAML for all commands. You can edit it directly, for example to add extra data or change the action/target.{problems}

data_description.commands: Media player commands to be overridden. Almost all media player action commands may be overridden.

config_menu.title: Configuration Menu
config_menu.description: Choose how to configure the commands for this player, or finalize the configuration.

config_guided_confirm.title: Configure commands - Guided (Warning)
config_guided_confirm.description:
Guided configuration only lets you pick a single target entity per command, and replaces all commands with what you pick on the next screen.

Some of your current commands use a custom rule (extra data, multiple targets…) that will be lost unless you re-enter them there.

menu_options.config_guided_proceed: I understand, continue and lose some data

children.title: Edit children
children.description: **Children are the real media players this player controls and reflects by default (state and attributes are read from the active one, commands are sent to it).**

data_description.children: Can be left empty. Ordered list of child media players that this entity will control.

advanced.title: Advanced configuration
advanced.description: Optional advanced settings. Leave any field empty to use the default behavior.

data_description.browse_media_entity: Allows override the browse media entity to desired media player. Only affects browsing the media library - playback is still sent to the active child (or the play_media command override, if set).
data_description.active_child_template: A template that will allow you to select (override) active child. Must return the entity_id of the child selected as active, or None to use the default behavior.
data_description.state_template: A template can be specified to render the state of the media player. In this way, the state may depend on entities that are not themselves media players, like switches or input booleans.

config_guided_no_children.title: Configure commands - Guided (Unavailable)
config_guided_no_children.description: Guided configuration requires at least one child media player that supports at least one known command. Edit the children first, or go back to the menu.

error.invalid_action: Invalid action or entity for this command.
error.incomplete_command: Incorrect configuration to fix : pick both an entity and an action, or leave both blank
error.invalid_template_result: This template must render to a plain state value, not a boolean, number or other type.
error.invalid_active_child_template_result: This template must render to the entity_id of an existing media player, or be left empty.

deprecated_yaml.title: The {integration_title} YAML configuration is deprecated
deprecated_yaml.description: Configuring {integration_title} via YAML is deprecated and will be removed. Your existing configuration has been imported automatically. Remove the YAML entry from configuration.yaml.
